What We Offer

Three Specialities, One Trusted Partner

Whether you need a private driver, a licensed guide, or a photographer to capture your journey — we handle it all with professionalism and warmth.

Private Transportation

Comfortable, safe, and punctual private vehicle service across Chiang Mai and all of Thailand. Toyota Commuter van and Fortuner SUV available for airport transfers, day trips, and multi-day journeys.

→ All regions of Thailand

Licensed Tourist Guide

Officially licensed and certified guide with deep knowledge of Thai culture, history, and hidden gems. Fluent, personable, and dedicated to making every trip exceptional for individuals and groups.

→ Fully licensed & certified

Travel Photography

Professional photography service during your tour — capturing the landscapes, temples, villages, and memories of your Thailand experience beautifully and naturally.

→ Memories worth keeping
10+

Years Experience

About Us

A Trusted Partner
Based in Chiang Mai

Private Planning Travels TH offers professional private transportation, licensed tourist guide services, and travel photography across all of Thailand — all from our home base in Chiang Mai.

With over ten years of experience in the field, we understand what agencies and travelers truly need: reliability, warmth, and a guide who genuinely cares about every guest's experience from the first moment to the last.

"I invite any agency in need of a private guide or driver to consider me for managing your programs and caring for your clients. I look forward to the opportunity of partnering with you."
10+Years in Tourism
3Core Services
Allof Thailand

Partnering with Travel Agencies

Are you an agency looking for a reliable private guide or driver in Thailand? Private Planning Travels TH is ready to manage your programs and care for your clients with professionalism, discretion, and warmth. Let's build a lasting partnership.

What Our Guests Say

★★★★★

"We love Nop! Best tour guide ever — we came back to see him again after 10 years. He showed us the local places. He is so funny and kind and teaches us so much about the culture.
